steps.title: Factor the quadratic to find its roots
steps.content: $125x^2 - (25a+5b)x + ab = 0$ factors as $(25x - b)(5x - a) = 0$, giving roots $x = b/25$ and $x = a/5$.

steps.title: Read off k
steps.content: The sum equals $(1/25)(5a+b) = k(5a+b)$, so $k = 1/25 = 0.04$. That matches the answer $1/25$ - 1/25 is correct.
